texto: 97, inciso I, “l”; art. 98, inciso I, “d”, item 18, “m”, item 3, e “u”; art. 99, inciso I, “b”, item 4; art. 105, incisos VI e VII; art. 106, incisos III e IV; art. 108, inciso III; art. 109, inciso V; art. 110, inciso VII, “a” e “b”; art. 112, inciso III, “d”; art. 113, incisos VI, “d” e “e”, e VIII; art. 115, incisos IX, “a” e “b”, e X; art. 116, inciso X; art. 117, inciso I, “g”; art. 119, incisos III, “c”, e IX, “f”; art. 124, inciso VI, “a” e “b”; art. 134, §§ 1º, 2º e 3º; art. 135, inciso VII; art. 139, inciso IV, “e”; e art. 145-A.
